bird.name: Scissor-tailed nightjar
bird.summary: The scissor-tailed nightjar (Hydropsalis torquata) is a species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is distributed over much of eas…

locations.name: 南半球
locations.summary: 南半球（英語：Southern Hemisphere）是指地球赤道以南的半球。南半球表面有80.9%是水，佔地球的57.1%；19.1%是陸地，佔地球的32.7%。 南半球包含了地球的五大洲：亚洲印度尼西亞南部、非洲中部及南部、大洋洲絕大…

locations.name: 亞馬遜雨林
locations.summary: 亞馬遜雨林（葡萄牙語：Amazônia、西班牙語：Amazonia），又稱亞馬遜河雨林，位於南美洲亞馬遜盆地的熱帶雨林，佔地僅存約500萬平方公里，使這片雨林生機盎然的就是亞馬遜河。雨林橫越了8個國家：巴西（佔森林60%面積）、哥倫比亞、…

relations.subject: Scissor-tailed nightjar
relations.evidence: The southerly ones are thought to be migratory, spending the austral winter in southern Amazonia
